subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-11-21
subcodes.first_line: Jesus spoke everything in parables because the ideal sense is, in this way, revealed and understood.
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @symbolism
